nasb.text: Now concerning the things about which you wrote, it is good for a man not to touch a woman.

esv.text: Now concerning the matters about which you wrote: “It is good for a man not to have sexual relations with a woman.”

cnv.text: 關於你們信上所提的事:“男人不親近女人倒好。”

ccb.text: 关于你们信上所写的事，我认为男人不亲近女人是好的。

csbs.text: 关于你们所写的事，你们说“男人不碰女人是好事”；
